name: GitHub
description: Full GitHub integration: repos, issues, PRs, code search, file content, releases, notifications, and starred repos

credentials_required.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at github.com/settings/tokens — needs 'repo' scope for private repos, or 'public_repo' for public only

tools.name: get_repo_info
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific GitHub repository

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues for a GitHub repository

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List pull requests for a GitHub repository

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.description: Get details of a specific pull request

tools.name: get_file_content
tools.description: Read a file from a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_releases
tools.description: List releases for a GitHub repository

author: freddy-schuetz
